install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y --no-install-recommends wget unzip && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

python -c "import os; checks = ['/data/datasets/METR-LA/train_data.npy', '/data/datasets/PEMS-BAY/train_data.npy', '/data/datasets/PEMS04/train_data.npy']; missing = [f for f in checks if not os.path.exists(f)]; assert not missing, f'Missing datasets: {missing}'; print('All 3 STF dataset directories verified')"
